item.title: Damir Javor
item.description: Damir Javor (Ljubljana, 3 March 1974) is a Slovenian professional basketball referee, who has been a FIBA international referee since 2006 and is regarded as one of the top European officials of his generation.[1][2][3][4][5]

item.title: Ceradryops punctatus
item.description: Ceradryops punctatus, is a species of long-toed water beetle found in Sri Lanka.[1][2][3]

item.title: Illa del Rei
item.description: L'Illa del Rei (Spanish: Isla del Rey; lit. 'King's Island'), also called Hospital Island in English, is a small island in the middle of the main navigable entry channel to Mahón on the northeastern side of Menorca in the Mediterranean Sea.

item.title: Nethery
item.description: Nethery is a surname. Notable people with the surname include:

item.title: Mohan Shumsher Jung Bahadur Rana cabinet
item.description: Mohan Shumsher Jung Bahadur Rana formed the first government of Nepal after the 1951 democracy movement. The government was formed by the proclamation of King Tribhuvan on 17 February 1951 and incorporated members of the Rana regime and the Nepali Congress. The king retained the right to dissolve the cabinet at any time and the cabinet would be responsible to him and the prime minister was to inform the king of all decisions.[1][2]
